data.sourceTitle: Meine Familie ist ziemlich groß.

data.sourceTitle: Am Montag muss ich staubsaugen, und am...
data.sourcePassage: Am Montag muss ich staubsaugen, und am Donnerstag räume ich mein Zimmer auf. So bleibt das Haus sauber.
data.targetPassage: On Monday I have to vacuum, and on Thursday I tidy my room. That way the house stays clean.

questions.question: What does the speaker have to do on Monday?
questions.modelAnswer: The speaker has to vacuum on Monday.

questions.question: What does the speaker do on Thursday?
questions.modelAnswer: The speaker tidies their room on Thursday.

questions.question: What does 'muss' show here?
questions.modelAnswer: It shows obligation.
